6:
You hand the spectrolium to a grateful Wiltwaek and explain its purpose. Now, your friend informs you, all that is left to do is to create another high-quality copy of <Emphasis>Noble Gold</Emphasis> to prove that Severian's concoction is sound. Craft one now to use at Waoud's trial.

<UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>In order to complete this quest, you must have learned the advanced recipes contained within <Emphasis>Master Alchemist III</Emphasis>.<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>

You hand the spectrolium to a grateful Wiltwaek and explain its purpose. Now, your friend informs you, all that is left to do is to create another high-quality copy of <Emphasis>Noble Gold</Emphasis> to prove that Severian's concoction is sound. Craft one now to use at Waoud's trial.

8:
Wiltwaek and Chanene both thank you for your aid as a consulting alchemist, and hope that you will have happier reason to work together in the future.

※The next alchemist quest will be available from Severian once you have completed the main scenario quest “The Far Edge of Fate.”
